findings.description: The source note under テストメソッド分割 includes a broader guideline: even outside the explicit split examples, if cramming various test cases into a single test data sheet reduces readability, the sheet should be split. This general guideline is omitted from s2.
findings.source_evidence: 上記以外でも、１つのテストデータシートにさまざまなテストケースを詰め込むと可読性が下がる場合は、テストデータシートを分割する。

findings.description: The `Advice` class name is missing from s7 hints. The source defines two overloads of execute(), one of which takes an `Advice` parameter: `execute(String sheetName, Advice advice)`.
